title: TorSharp Mirror Manifest
description: Describes the latest mirrored Tor expert bundles and Privoxy packages with SHA256 checksums.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this manifest was generated.

tor.description: Tor expert bundle entries keyed by '{os}-{arch}'. Valid os values: 'windows', 'linux'. Valid arch values: 'x86', 'x86_64'.

privoxy.description: Privoxy package entries keyed by '{os}' (Windows) or '{os}-{arch}' (Linux). Examples: 'windows', 'linux-i386', 'linux-amd64'.

version.description: Dotted version string parsable by System.Version, e.g. '15.0.14' or '4.1.0'.

url.description: Absolute HTTPS URL of the binary asset.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex-encoded SHA256 digest of the binary asset.

runtimeDeps.description: apt package names required at runtime (Linux only).
